lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: Thank you for your work in bringing peace back to these islands, [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: I hear that the Etceterians have also pledged to give you some of their resources, as thanks for preventing war once again.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: Remember, speak to Ghrim if you require assistance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think Prince Brand would make the best heir.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: Is that your honest opinion after having spent time with my daughter? The Princess might receive the news rather coldly. A broken trust is difficult to mend.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: As you wish. I will pay heed to your recommendation.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: As you wish. I will keep this conversation between us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think Princess Astrid would make the best heir.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: Is that your honest opinion after having spent time with my son? The Prince might receive the news rather coldly. A broken trust is difficult to mend.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: As you wish. I will pay heed to your recommendation.

lines.speaker: King Vargas
lines.text: As you wish. I will keep this conversation between us.
